stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Daylen Lile rally-killer GIDP · Bot 3
notableEvents.detail: Daylen Lile grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. CJ Abrams out at 2nd. Daylen Lile out at 1st.
